item_text: the diagram illustrates a sequence of interactions between a user, an application, a server, and a database to calculate and display co2 emissions for a route.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-route-001 title: verify route initiation and emission calculation module: route management source pages: 2, 4 preconditions: user is logged in and a route is initiated. test data: valid route details. test steps: 1. user initiates a route. 2. application sends data to the server for calculation. 3. server adds the route to the database. 4. server retrieves the new route information. 5. server returns emissions data to the application. 6. application displays co2 emissions to the user. expected result: user receives co2 emissions data for the newly initiated route.
